name: i-have-adhd
description: Shape Claude Code and Codex output for an ADHD reader: lead with the next action, number steps, suppress tangents, restate state, and make wins visible.

interface.longDescription: Make Claude Code and Codex responses easier to act on with direct answers, numbered steps, visible progress, and fewer tangents.
defaultPrompt: Use i-have-adhd to make every response action-first and easy to scan.
